body:
tungsten-forge v2.0 -- PASS 1, STAGE 2 CHECKPOINT

SLS(29) draft written to MQL4/Experts (XM Global demo terminal), 8 real Change Warrants filed and closed in the ledger:

W1 break-even buffer (Point*5 -> intelligence.atr*0.125)
W2 minTolerance (Point*5, comment said "5 pips" but was actually 0.5 pip on this 5-digit broker -- real comment/value mismatch bug, logged as Lesson #1)
W3 rangeWidth SIT_OUT gate (Point*10 -> _atrRW*0.25)
W4 stopDistance validation (Point*10 -> _atrSD*0.25)
W5 MTF counter-trend S/R proximity (Point*10*5 -> _atrMTF*1.25)
W6 double-bottom/top swing tolerance (5*Point -> intelligence.atr*0.125)
W7 trendAngles/maSlopes denominator (5*Point -> _atrTA*5 / _atrMA*5 -- this one was a second, wrongly-normalised copy of the angle calc living alongside the correct ATR-normalised ema21Angle, a real PARITY-class defect, not just SCALE)
W8 ema21Angle's three un-agreeing degree cut-points (10.0/10.0/12.0) -- added g_ART.ema21AngleTrend, learned via ART_CalibrateStructural using the exact same idiom as emaDispTrend/emaSlopeTrend. Measured on 121,026 real bars: p93=10.54 deg, which is where the old cuts actually sat on this instrument -- so this is a legality conversion that preserves current behavior, not a resurrection re-tune (that's Stage 3, kept separate on purpose).

Structural parity (H6) verified: brace delta 0 (matches base), paren delta -5 unchanged from base.

Honest status: every warrant above is marked PENDING_BACKTEST or PENDING_COMPILE in the ledger, not CONFIRMED -- Stage 2 only proves legality + a same-order-of-magnitude sanity check against real EURUSD M5 data, not improvement. No compile yet (holding per Manuel's instruction until pass 2).

BLOCKER before Stage 3 onward can be real rather than narrative: Stages 3 (resurrection fire-rate proof), 4 (IC/learning integrity), 6 (parity + null-ghost), 7 (orthogonal validation) all require actually running TUNGSTEN's logic over historical bars to get trade outcomes -- that means driving MT4 Strategy Tester (tester.ini + .set config via terminal.exe command line) against the real XMGlobal-Demo EURUSD5.hst, not something I can produce honestly from static analysis. Setting that up now; will report once I have real backtest output rather than assert numbers I haven't measured.
